title: Deva
tmdbOverview: Dev Ambre, a ruthless cop, loses his memory in an accident just after he has finished solving a murder case and now has to reinvestigate it while keeping his memory loss a secret from everyone except DCP Farhan Khan.
synopsis: Deva (2025) is a action, thriller and mystery film from India. It carries a 6.7 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 12 certification (BR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
